title: Resident doctors in England call off strike after new offer from government
description: The walkout had been due to start at 07:00 BST on Monday and last until Friday.
content:
Resident doctors in England have called off strikes which were scheduled to begin on Monday.
The British Medical Association (BMA) said the government had "made a new offer" at the last minute which would be put to its members for a vote.
The walkout... [2561 chars]

title: US-Iran peace deal scheduled to be signed on Sunday, says Trump
description: Before the US president's comments, Iran expressed caution about the exact timing.
content:
A deal to end fighting between the US and Iran is "scheduled to get signed" on Sunday, US President Donald Trump has said - but Iran has cast doubt on the timing.
In a post on social media, Trump also said the Strait of Hormuz, a key shipping route f... [1605 chars]

title: Far-right and anti-racist protesters clash in UK cities after Belfast riots
description: Police make several arrests as rival demonstrators take to streets of Brighton, Liverpool, Sheffield and Glasgow
content:
Far-right marches took place across the UK on Saturday after violent unrest in Belfast and Southampton in recent days.
Several people were arrested on Saturday afternoon as far-right groups clashed with anti-racist and anti-fascist demonstrators in B... [4662 chars]

title: Molly Russell's dad says rushing social media restrictions 'deplorable'
description: Father of a teenager who took her own life after viewing harmful content says plans appear to have been brought forward for a "political reason".
content:
The father of a teenager who took her own life after viewing harmful content online has said he is "dismayed" by reports the government is to ban young people from using some social media platforms.

title: Liverpool anti-immigration march results in eight arrests
description: Most shops, cafes, pubs and businesses along County Road, Liverpool, stay closed for the protest.
content:
Eight people have been arrested during an anti-immigration march in Liverpool which also saw counter-protest groups gather.
